ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery address */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Time when the order is expected to be delivered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES order_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "choice_description" TEXT /* Description of choices made for the item */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item ordered */,
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item to link to the `menu_items` table */,
  "customizations" TEXT /* JSON string containing any customizations made to the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_menu_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Primary delivery address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the customer for loyalty rewards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Availability status of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the menu item belongs */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image for the menu item */,
  "nutritional_info" TEXT /* JSON string containing nutritional information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the menu item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the menu item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, staff, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
